sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110026" key="u(ywtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψ-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n110026.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing the exaltation of a planet,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ζῴδιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:228:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">228.20</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
